query: Tesla Master Plan Part 3 summary key details 2026
a_issues: The notateslaapp.com snippet in A is very thin (just one sentence naming the three components). The tesla.com/master-plans result is mostly a giant list of language/locale links with no substantive content. b_issues: Same lack of any 2026-specific information, since Master Plan Part 3 was published in 2023, but this applies equally to A. No other notable factual flaws.
reasoning: Both sets correctly identify Master Plan Part 3 as a 41-page document published April 5, 2023, focused on electrification, energy supply, and material feasibility — matching the anchor. However, Content B's notateslaapp.com excerpt is far more detailed and useful, providing the three main components, the 27% energy-loss statistic, and a clear description of the plan's goals, while Content A's version of the same source is reduced to a single sentence. Additionally, Content A wastes space with a nearly content-free tesla.com/master-plans page (just locale links) and a raw PDF footnote/reference dump that offers no synthesized information about the plan's actual content. Content B's results are more consistently substantive and would better enable an LLM to construct an accurate summary.
